creator: bruno@tinkerbox.org
text:
(In reply to Yusuf Yaman from comment #17)
ah I get it I did not realize you were the guy from the forums :-)
ok I appreciate the feedback. Glad it builds for you too.

well its a bit confusing that now there are two patch files for the same thing in this report. Also it's hard to see what changed from your patch to mine within bugzilla since it can't diff both patches, I don't think it helps the comitter that there is that duplication.

I think it would be better if you could let me know the changes that are necessary, to fix if anything is broken, and I incorporate and update my patch and then you delete your patch so there is no confusion.

What essential fixes did you make besides adding walletd/renterd/hostd to the net-p2p/Makefile subdir list ?

It seems to me all the other changes are just reordering some of the targets in the Makefiles, correct ?
